full_prompt: Design a monolithic 6061-T6 aluminum solar-array canopy panel mount for a Formula Sun Grand Prix 2026 single-occupant Class solar vehicle per FSGP 2026 regulations, with a solar array of <= 4 m^2 projected and an optional reflector mounted on a 3.1-mile Brainerd International Raceway course. The bracket clamps the monolithic composite solar panel (area 2.0 m x 1.0 m = 2.0 m^2, panel mass 12 kg) to the vehicle's space-frame canopy rails, carrying aerodynamic lift + drag + rollover + transport loads. Bracket is a single billet-machined 6061-T6 part (no welds, no bolted gussets; integral panel-clamp + integral rail-clamp + integral drag-strut anchor). Geometry: panel-side clamp 60 mm wide x 40 mm tall x 4 mm thick with an integral M8 (9 mm) clearance clamp-screw through-hole and a 25 mm wide x 4 mm deep groove matching the panel's perimeter carbon-fiber reinforcement; rail-side clamp 50 mm ID half-saddle (matching a 50 mm OD canopy rail) x 60 mm long x 5 mm wall, with two M8 (9 mm) clamp-bolt holes; diagonal drag-strut anchor 30 mm OD x 20 mm long stub at 45 deg offset with a 8 mm through-bore. Overall bounding envelope 160 x 80 x 100 mm. Material 6061-T6 (E 68.9 GPa, nu 0.33, density 2700 kg/m^3, yield 276 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, endurance 97 MPa at 5e8 cycles). Environment: 0-45 C ambient (Brainerd summer), continuous solar irradiance 1000 W/m^2 direct beam, peak vehicle speed 70 mph (31.3 m/s); UV-exposed paint clear anodized. Three load cases. Load Case 1 (aero at peak 70 mph): lift coefficient CL ~ 0.15 on the 2 m^2 panel at dynamic pressure 0.5 * 1.2 * 31.3^2 = 588 Pa gives 176 N lift + 88 N drag; applied as distributed panel load through the panel-clamp; rail-clamp fixed. Load Case 2 (gust lift 2x): factor-of-2 gust per FSGP scrutineering conservative practice = 352 N lift at panel clamp. Load Case 3 (transport / rollover): 5g vertical on the 12 kg panel mass = 588 N distributed, with single-point rail clamp fixed representing a jacked-up vehicle during transport. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 aero, peak von Mises must not exceed 138 MPa (yield/2.0); (R2) under LC2 gust, peak stress 184 MPa (yield/1.5 transient); (R3) under LC3 transport, peak stress 184 MPa; (R4) fatigue: 10^6 cycles of LC1 scaled 60% (day-race vibration spectrum) local stress range at any fillet or hole edge must remain below 97 MPa (R=-1 5e8 endurance conservatively applied to 1e6); (R5) a steady-state thermal analysis at 45 C ambient with 1000 W/m^2 absorbed on the panel upper face (the panel is 18% efficient, so 820 W/m^2 rejected as heat) thermally conducting through the aluminum clamp must show the clamp body temperature below 85 C to prevent T6 overaging; (R6) panel flatness-preservation: maximum clamp-induced panel-curvature deflection at the panel clamp under LC1 must be below 1 mm over the clamp's 40 mm width to avoid cell micro-cracking; (R7) bracket mass must not exceed 0.25 kg. Fluid analysis reduced to equivalent static pressures; buckling, vibration, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic 6061-T6 aluminum solar-array canopy-panel mount for a Formula Sun Grand Prix single-occupant solar vehicle (<=4 m^2 projected array, 2 m x 1 m monolithic composite panel, 12 kg panel mass, Brainerd International Raceway). The bracket is a single billet-machined 6061-T6 part with an integral panel-side clamp (4 mm grooved for the panel's carbon-fiber perimeter), a 50 mm ID rail-side half-saddle for a 50 mm canopy rail, and a 45-degree diagonal drag-strut anchor stub; no welds, no inserts. Apply yield/2.0 continuous and yield/1.5 transient safety factors.

Envelope: 160 x 80 x 100 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 aero at 70 mph: 176 N lift + 88 N drag distributed through the panel clamp (CL ~0.15 on 2 m^2, q = 588 Pa), rail clamp fixed.
- LC2 gust lift (2x): 352 N lift at the panel clamp.
- LC3 transport / rollover: 5 g vertical on 12 kg = 588 N distributed, single-point rail-clamp fixed (jacked-up vehicle).
Also require a steady-state thermal check at 45 C ambient with 820 W/m^2 panel heat rejection (clamp body below 85 C to preserve T6 temper) and a 1e6-cycle fatigue margin off 60% of LC1.

prompt.title: FSGP solar canopy panel mount bracket
prompt.brief: 6061-T6 panel clamp + rail saddle + drag strut anchor; aero + gust + transport loads + UV/thermal.

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Low-speed road vibration non-governing for clamp.

eval_coverage: panel flatness preservation for cell integrity
